overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a covered commercial walkway with vibrant digital billboards, transitioning through an illuminated tunnel into a sunlit urban park beneath elevated highways. The journey continues through the park past benches, dense vegetation, and pedestrians, ending near a plaza with a yellow food kiosk.

segments.scene_description: Walking through a covered commercial walkway with wet concrete floors reflecting the glow of massive digital billboards overhead. The space is lined with concrete pillars and metal railings, with sparse pedestrians moving through the semi-enclosed environment.

illuminated floor tiles displaying advertisements including 'MIX IT' text
vertical digital screen on the left wall showing 'TRUST' text

segments.scene_description: Moving through a narrow enclosed tunnel with glowing floor panels displaying advertisements. The tunnel walls are dark concrete with occasional digital screens, leading toward a bright exit visible at the far end where vegetation becomes visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban park beneath elevated highway with wooden walkways

slight turn to the right to follow the curved wooden pathway

tall palm trees lining the right side of the walkway

wooden benches placed along the left side of the walkway
piles of garbage bags and debris accumulated near the benches
modern skyscrapers visible in the background beyond the trees

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the tunnel into a bright sunlit urban park situated beneath elevated highway overpasses. The scene features wooden walkways, dense palm trees, scattered pedestrians, and piles of trash along the railings, with modern glass skyscrapers visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: park plaza with food kiosk and water feature

segments.scene_description: Walking into a more open plaza area featuring a distinctive yellow food kiosk and a central water feature. The elevated highway structure shifts to the left side of the frame as the ground transitions from wooden planks to concrete paving, with fewer pedestrians visible in this section of the park.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a neon-lit commercial corridor into a bright, sun-drenched urban park. It begins by moving through a covered walkway where wet concrete floors reflect the vibrant glow of massive overhead digital billboards and concrete pillars. As the camera advances, the environment narrows into an enclosed tunnel characterized by dark walls and glowing advertisement panels embedded in the floor. The scene then opens abruptly as the camera emerges from the tunnel's bright exit, shifting from artificial neon light to natural sunlight. Finally, the view expands across a park beneath elevated highway overpasses, passing wooden walkways and dense palm trees with towering glass skyscrapers looming in the background.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a shaded park area opens into a bright, spacious urban plaza. It begins by moving away from the dense greenery of the park, where the elevated highway structure gradually shifts toward the left side of the frame. As the camera advances, the ground transitions from rustic wooden planks to smooth concrete paving, signaling a shift in the environment. The scene then expands into an open plaza area, passing a few scattered pedestrians before arriving at a central water feature. Finally, the movement concludes as the camera approaches a distinctive yellow food kiosk standing prominently within the sunlit square.
